zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wade於1500年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Wade de Sowerby16歲，母親Marie Comyn51歲。他於大約1541年與Lady Anne Lister在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1579年在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可哈利法可 聖 詹姆斯享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Wade于1500年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William Wade de Sowerby16岁，母亲Marie Comyn51岁。他于大约1541年与Lady Anne Lister在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1579年在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可哈利法可 聖 詹姆斯享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wade (Old English Wada or, via Norman French, from ancient Germanic Wado, of unclear origin but possibly related to Old English wadan ‘to go’).

English: topographic name from Middle English wade ‘ford’ (Old English (ge)wæd ‘ford, especially a tidal crossing’) for someone who lived by a ford, or a habitational name from a place so called, such as Wade Hall in North Cove (Suffolk).
Irish: shortened and altered from Mac Uaid, see McQuaid .

variants.name: Wadeson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Wade  .

variants.name: Wass
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Wace (ancient Germanic Waz(z)o), a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Wad- (compare Wade 1). The name Wace was common among the Normans, alongside the Parisian French variant Gace, and was latinized as Wazo (nominative), Wazonis (genitive).
English (of Norman origin): occasionally, perhaps a variant of Vause with vocalizing of initial V-.
German: nickname from Middle High German was(se) ‘sharp, cutting’.

variants.name: Waide
meanings: Irish: shortened form of Mac Uaid, see McQuaid .

variants.name: Waddy
meanings: English: variant of Wadey, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Wady, a pet form of Wade , or in northern England alternatively a shortened form of Waldo . The name may also be a variant of Wilday .

variants.name: McQuaid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Nuala.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaid ‘son of Uad’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Scottish form McQuate .

variants.name: Waithe
meanings: either a topographic name from Old Norse vath ‘ford’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Waithe (Lincolnshire) and Wath (North and Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wade was born in 1500, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Wade de Sowerby, was 16 and his mother, Marie Comyn, was 51. He married Lady Anne Lister about 1541, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1579, in Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wade est né en 1500, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Wade de Sowerby, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Marie Comyn, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Lister environ 1541, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1579, à Halifax St James, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Er hat um 1541 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne Lister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Lui sposato Lady Anne Lister circa 1541, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1579, nel Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wadeが1500年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Wade de Sowerbyは16歳，母Marie Comynは51歳であった。約1541年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでLady Anne Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1579年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスハリファックス スト ジャムスで79歳で死去した。

ko.King Crosse, Halifax, West Riding, Yorks: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wade(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wade de Sowerby(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie Comyn(은)는 51세였다. 그는 대략 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 Lady Anne Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1579년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wade nasceu em 1500, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Wade de Sowerby, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Marie Comyn, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Lister aproximadamente 1541, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1579, em Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.King Crosse, Halifax, West Riding, Yorks: хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wade родился в 1500 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Wade de Sowerby было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Comyn, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Lister около 1541 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1579 г. в местности хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.King Crosse, Halifax, West Riding, Yorks: Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Wade nació en 1500, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Wade de Sowerby, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Marie Comyn, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Lister aproximadamente 1541, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1579, en Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
